name: Zerodha Trading Platform — PostgreSQL & Flyway Migration Setup
scenario: Upgrade the Zerodha trading platform from H2 in-memory development to production-ready PostgreSQL with Flyway schema management. Create the complete migration history for the trading platform's schema and configure environment-specific datasources.
description: Docker Compose PostgreSQL + 4 Flyway migrations (users, trades, portfolio, indexes) + Spring Boot profile configuration (local H2 vs prod PostgreSQL) + @DataJpaTest that works without PostgreSQL.

core.description: docker-compose.yml: PostgreSQL 16-alpine, container 'zerodha-db', database/user/password=zerodha, port 5432, named volume 'zerodha-data'.
V1__create_users_table.sql: users (id UUID default gen_random_uuid(), email UNIQUE NOT NULL, full_name NOT NULL, phone nullable, created_at). Index on email.
V2__create_trades_table.sql: trades (id, user_id FK→users, symbol, qty INT, price DECIMAL, trade_type CHECK IN ('BUY','SELL'), executed_at). Indexes on user_id and symbol.
V3__create_portfolio_holdings.sql: portfolio_holdings (id, user_id FK, symbol, total_qty, avg_price, updated_at). UNIQUE constraint on (user_id, symbol). Index on user_id.
V4__add_constraints.sql: adds CHECK constraints (qty>0, price>0) to trades + index on executed_at. Demonstrates adding constraints to existing table.

application-local.properties: H2, no Flyway, create-drop, h2-console enabled. application-prod.properties: PostgreSQL, Flyway enabled, ddl-auto=validate. src/test/resources/application.properties: H2, no Flyway, create-drop.
@DataJpaTest (3 tests): save Trade entity, findByUserId, findBySymbol. All 3 pass using H2 (no PostgreSQL connection needed). Trade @Entity + TradeRepository.

bonus.description: V5 data migration: insert 3 seed users and 5 seed trades into the production schema. Show how seed data migrations work (INSERT statements in SQL file).
MigrationVerificationTest @SpringBootTest: starts full context with CI profile pointing to local PostgreSQL (via docker compose). Verifies flyway_schema_history has 4 rows. Verifies 3 tables exist.
Add V6 to rename 'price' column to 'execution_price' using the safe 3-step approach: add new column, backfill, drop old. Document why direct RENAME is risky during zero-downtime deploys.

data_to_use:
PostgreSQL connection (local):
  URL: jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/zerodha
  User: zerodha
  Password: zerodha

Schema evolution order:
  V1: users (foundation)
  V2: trades (depends on users)
  V3: portfolio_holdings (depends on users)
  V4: constraints on trades

Test data for @DataJpaTest:
  User U01, symbol TCS, qty 10, price ₹3890, BUY
  User U01, symbol INFY, qty 5, price ₹1560, SELL
  User U02, symbol TCS, qty 3, price ₹3895, BUY

# src/main/java/com/zerodha/TradeRepository.java
# src/test/java/com/zerodha/TradeRepositoryTest.java (@DataJpaTest)

criteria: Correct image, env, port, volume (10 pts)

ai_policy_explanation: Limited to 5 hints. gen_random_uuid(): PostgreSQL 13+ built-in; no extension needed. Foreign key syntax: REFERENCES users(id) in the column definition or as separate CONSTRAINT. UNIQUE constraint on multiple columns: UNIQUE(user_id, symbol) at table level. test application.properties must be in src/test/resources (not src/main/resources). flyway-database-postgresql: required Spring Boot 3+ dependency alongside flyway-core.
submission_instructions: GitHub push. Include all SQL migration files. README explains how to start PostgreSQL (docker compose up -d) and run the app. All 3 @DataJpaTest tests pass without PostgreSQL running.
tips_for_success: Start with V1 (simplest, no FK dependencies), then build V2 and V3 on top
CHECK constraint in CREATE TABLE: price DECIMAL(12,2) NOT NULL CHECK (price > 0)
UNIQUE on multiple columns: add at end of CREATE TABLE: UNIQUE(user_id, symbol)
flyway.enabled=false in tests: critical, or Flyway tries to connect to PostgreSQL
concepts_reinforced: PostgreSQL via Docker Compose for local development
Flyway migration file naming and versioning
CREATE TABLE with CHECK, UNIQUE, REFERENCES constraints
Multi-file migration set with FK dependencies
